name: Papaya-Habanero Hot Sauce with Passion
recipeIngredient: 1 piece fresh gingerroot (1-inch), peel & coarse chop
recipeInstructions:
1. Spoon out the papaya flesh.
2. Combine the papaya flesh with the remaining ingredients in a food processor, and puree.
3. Pour the sauce into a nonreactive saucepan.
4. Heat until just boiling.
5. Remove from the heat, let cool, and then bottle.
